topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, the world was filled with selfishness and trouble. But one man named Noah loved God with his whole heart and walked faithfully with Him.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Noah, a kind bearded man in simple robes, standing on a hill overlooking an ancient village, golden sunset, bright cheerful family-friendly art style

scenes.narration: God spoke to Noah with a plan. Build a giant wooden ark, He said. A great flood is coming, but your family and the animals will be safe.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Noah kneeling in prayer with warm golden light streaming from the sky, rolling green hills, wonder-filled cheerful children's bible style

scenes.narration: Noah began to build. People laughed and pointed, but Noah kept working. Plank by plank, nail by nail, the enormous ark slowly took shape.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Noah and his three sons hammering a massive wooden ark on dry land, bright blue sky, cartoon family-friendly style, people watching curiously in background

scenes.narration: Then the animals came, two by two. Lions and lambs, elephants and mice, giraffes and rabbits, all walking calmly up the ramp into the ark.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful cheerful illustration of pairs of animals walking up a wooden ramp into a giant ark, lions giraffes elephants zebras rabbits, bright sunny day, children's storybook style, joyful

scenes.narration: The sky turned dark and the rain began to fall. Noah's family and all the animals were safely inside as the first drops pattered on the roof.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of the huge wooden ark with animals peeking out of windows, first raindrops falling from grey clouds, warm glowing lantern light inside, cozy family-friendly art

scenes.narration: For forty days and forty nights the rain poured down. Water covered the whole earth, but the ark floated safely, carried gently by God's loving hand.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful illustration of the wooden ark floating on endless blue ocean waves, soft rain falling, dramatic clouds with hints of sun breaking through, cheerful children's bible story style

scenes.narration: Noah sent out a dove to search for land. She returned carrying a fresh green olive leaf in her beak. The waters were finally going down.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a white dove with an olive branch in its beak flying toward the ark, Noah's smiling face at the window, soft warm sunlight, wonder-filled bright art

scenes.narration: When Noah stepped onto dry ground, God painted a beautiful rainbow across the sky. A forever promise of love, hope, and a brand new beginning.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Noah and his family looking up at a massive vibrant rainbow arching over green hills, animals spreading out, the ark on a mountain, joyful family-friendly children's bible art
